title: Ore Galore Modpack
description:
Ore Galore has never seen such an upgrade! Beautiful terrain paired with dynamic clouds builds onto the expansive underground which has tons of ores to discover, some being up to 3x better than netherite!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NSn0OSw4OqY
body:
Ore Galore has never seen such an upgrade! Beautiful terrain paired with dynamic clouds builds onto the already expansive underground which has tons of ores to discover, some materials being up to twice as powerful than netherite with special new mobs to combat with the new amazing gear!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NSn0OSw4OqY
Tutorial Video
